name: Meta
overview: Meta (formerly Facebook) builds technologies that help people connect. Known for fast-paced interviews with emphasis on coding speed and system design at scale.
hiringProcess: Meta's process is streamlined: recruiter call, technical phone screen (coding), then onsite with 2 coding rounds, 1 system design, and 1 behavioral round.
eligibility: Strong coding skills, ability to solve problems quickly. Experience with large-scale systems preferred.
preparationTips: Practice solving medium problems in 20 minutes. Focus on graph problems and dynamic programming. Study Meta's system design patterns.

interviewQuestions.title: Design Facebook News Feed
interviewQuestions.content: Design the News Feed system for a social media platform with billions of users.
interviewQuestions.expectedAnswer: Cover feed generation (push vs pull), ranking algorithm, caching strategy, and real-time updates.
interviewQuestions.sampleAnswer: Hybrid push/pull model: push for users with few friends, pull for celebrities. Rank using ML model considering recency, engagement, relationship. Cache pre-computed feeds in Redis. Use WebSocket for real-time updates.

problems.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
problems.statement: Given the root of a binary tree, return the level order traversal of its nodes' values.

optimal.approach: BFS is already optimal for level order

problems.interviewTips: Standard BFS template. Know variations: zigzag, right side view, bottom-up.
